description: Choose one of the following writing tasks and write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.title: Advice for a visitor
tasks.prompt: Your English-speaking friend is visiting your town next month and has asked for advice.||Write an email to your friend.||Say what places they should visit, what food they should try and what they should bring.||Write your email.
tasks.modelAnswer: Hi Alex,||I’m really happy that you’re coming to my town next month. I think you should visit the old castle because it is the most famous place here. You should also walk around the main square, where there are lots of small shops.||You must try the local cake because it is delicious, especially with hot chocolate. If you like pizza, there is also a great restaurant near the park.||You should bring comfortable shoes because we will probably walk a lot. It might rain, so bring a jacket too.||I’m sure you’ll have a great time.||See you soon,||Tom

tasks.title: Story
tasks.prompt: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.||Your story must begin with this sentence:||I picked up the phone and heard a voice I did not recognise.||Write your story.
tasks.startingSentence: I picked up the phone and heard a voice I did not recognise.
tasks.modelAnswer: I picked up the phone and heard a voice I did not recognise. The person asked for my brother and sounded very worried. I explained that my brother was at football practice.||The man said he had found my brother’s school bag on a bench near the park. I quickly called my mum, and we went there together. Luckily, the man was waiting with the bag. Nothing was missing, but my brother’s homework was inside.||When my brother came home, he was very relieved. He promised to be more careful, but I knew he would probably forget something again soon.
